name: evolving-pipeline
description: Static Evolving Pipeline quotation app with Supabase-backed storage.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');fs.mkdirSync('public',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('index.html',path.join('public','index.html'));if(fs.existsSync('supabase-setup.sql'))fs.copyFileSync('supabase-setup.sql',path.join('public','supabase-setup.sql'));console.log('Built static app into public/')"
